text:
Created attachment 207056
secpanel_OPTIONS_DEFAULT_results

FBSD version: 12.0
Ports version: Updated to revision 510675. Sat Aug 31 23:17:11 CDT 2019

Whilst new options have been added to the secpanel Makefile, it appears that something in the make process fails to honor the Terminal options choice selected.
Selecting "MATE" comes up with GNOME-terminal.

Ports options files shown in attachment. One with "OPTIONS_DEFAULT" and one without.

Removing "OPTIONS_DEFAULT=        GNOMETERMINAL" and selecting MATE does properly configure for MATE-terminal.
